title: Hiring Production Engineer at Su-Kam Power Systems Asia Pacific Associates
company: Su-Kam Power Systems Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Hiring Production Engineer at Su-Kam Power Systems Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Su-Kam Power Systems Asia Pacific Associates has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Jaipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Su-Kam Power Systems Asia Pacific Associates:
Su-Kam Power Systems Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Su-Kam Power Systems Asia Pacific Associates!
